title: Starter — Academic Word Choice
description: A sample module: choosing the right academic word in context. Bilingual hints and feedback (Arabic + English) for scaffolding.

questions.prompt: Choose the word that best completes the sentence: "The results were ___, leaving no doubt about the conclusion."
hint: leaving no doubt = لا يترك مجالاً للشك — so we need a strong, definite word.

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ 'conclusive' يعني قاطع/حاسم — it matches 'no doubt' (لا شك).
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'conclusive' (قاطع، نهائي). 'tentative' (مبدئي/غير مؤكد) و 'ambiguous' (غامض) كلاهما يدلّ على عدم اليقين، و 'arbitrary' يعني عشوائي — none of these fit a definite, doubt-free result.

questions.prompt: Which word means to make something clear or easier to understand?
questions.hint: clarify = يوضّح. Look for the word about making things clear (واضح).

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ 'clarify' يعني يوضّح — to make something clear.
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'clarify' (يوضّح). 'confuse' يعني يُربك، 'conceal' يعني يُخفي، و 'complicate' يعني يُعقّد — these are the opposite of making something clear.

questions.prompt: Select the correct form: "She has made significant ___ in her English this term."
hint: progress = تقدّم (an uncountable noun / اسم غير معدود)
After an adjective like 'significant', we need a noun — not a verb.

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ We need the noun 'progress' (تقدّم) after the adjective 'significant'.
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'progress' (تقدّم) — a noun. الكلمات الأخرى صيغ للفعل (verb forms)، and here we need a noun after 'significant'.

questions.prompt: Choose the best word: "The two studies produced ___ results, so we cannot be sure which is right."
questions.hint: contradictory = متناقض. The clue is 'cannot be sure which is right' — the results disagree.

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ 'contradictory' يعني متناقض — the results disagree with each other.
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'contradictory' (متناقض). 'identical' يعني متطابق، 'consistent' يعني متوافق/ثابت، و 'reliable' يعني موثوق — none of these explain why we 'cannot be sure which is right'.

questions.prompt: Which word best fits: "He gave a ___ summary — short and covering only the main points."
hint: The sentence itself defines it: 'short and covering only the main points'.

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ 'concise' يعني موجز — short and to the point.
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'concise' (موجز، مختصر). 'detailed' يعني مفصّل، 'lengthy' يعني طويل، و 'vague' يعني غامض — the opposite of a short, focused summary.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Scientists must ___ their claims with evidence."
questions.hint: support (a claim) = يدعم / يؤيّد بالأدلة. Think about what you do WITH evidence.

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ to 'support' a claim يعني يدعمها بالأدلة (back it up with evidence).
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'support' (يدعم). 'ignore' يعني يتجاهل، 'doubt' يعني يشكّ، و 'reject' يعني يرفض — you don't do these to your own claims with evidence.

questions.prompt: Choose the word that means happening at a fixed, agreed time: "The train is very ___; it always arrives on time."
questions.hint: punctual = دقيق في المواعيد / في الوقت المحدّد. The clue is 'always arrives on time'.

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ 'punctual' يعني دقيق في المواعيد — always on time.
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'punctual' (دقيق في المواعيد). 'frequent' يعني متكرر، 'delayed' يعني متأخر، و 'random' يعني عشوائي — only 'punctual' means always on time.

questions.prompt: Which word completes the sentence correctly: "There is a clear ___ between smoking and lung disease."
hint: We need a noun after 'a clear', and it should mean a connection.

feedback.correct: Correct ✓ a 'link' (صلة/ارتباط) is a connection between two things.
feedback.incorrect: The answer is 'link' (صلة، ارتباط) — a noun meaning a connection. 'different'، 'similar'، 'apart' صفات/ظروف (adjectives/adverbs) and don't fit after 'a clear ___'.
